# Nodalite

> Runtime-agnostic TypeScript API framework. The same App runs unmodified on Node.js, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, and AWS Lambda.

## Overview

Nodalite is a small, zero-dependency TypeScript API framework built on the standard Fetch API (Request/Response). It provides routing, middleware, validation, authentication, WebSocket support, observability, background workers, ML inference, and OpenAPI generation — all runtime-agnostic.

## Key Features

- Runtime-agnostic: same code runs on Node, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda
- Zero runtime dependencies in core (@nodalite/core)
- Built-in security: CORS, security headers, rate limiting, JWT auth, body size limits
- Full auth stack: JWT access/refresh tokens, OAuth2 PKCE (Google, GitHub, Discord), RBAC, sessions, CSRF
- WebSocket support: rooms, heartbeat, path-based routing across all runtimes
- Observability: OpenTelemetry tracing and HTTP metrics
- Background threads: worker_threads for bots, pollers, CPU offload
- ML inference: serverless-aware model runner with ONNX Runtime adapter
- OpenAPI 3.1.0 spec generation, Swagger UI, and ReDoc
- Route auto-discovery from file system
- Request validation via Standard Schema (Zod, Valibot, ArkType)

- [Home](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/)
- [Introduction](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guide/)

- [Scaffolding](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guide/scaffolding)
- [Installation](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guide/installation)
- [Core Concepts](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guide/core-concepts)

## API Reference

- [Overview](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/)
- [@nodalite/core](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/core) — App, Context, Router, HttpError, validate, discover
- [@nodalite/middleware](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/middleware) — cors, securityHeaders, rateLimit, jwtAuth, bodyLimit
- [@nodalite/auth](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/auth) — JWT, OAuth2 PKCE, RBAC, sessions, password hashing, CSRF
- [@nodalite/adapter-node](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/adapter-node) — serve() for Node.js
- [@nodalite/adapter-lambda](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/adapter-lambda) — createLambdaHandler() for AWS Lambda
- [@nodalite/adapter-edge](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/adapter-edge) — createEdgeHandler() for Cloudflare Workers
- [@nodalite/ws](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/ws) — WsServer, rooms, heartbeat, multi-runtime adapters
- [@nodalite/workers](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/workers) — runDetached(), WorkerPool
- [@nodalite/scheduler](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/scheduler) — Scheduler, cron/interval, toServerlessTask
- [@nodalite/otel](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/otel) — OpenTelemetry middleware, metrics, span enrichment
- [@nodalite/ml](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/ml) — Model, onnxEngine, cached inference
- [@nodalite/openapi](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/openapi) — OpenAPI 3.1.0, Swagger UI, ReDoc
- [Errors](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/api/errors) — HttpError class reference

## Guides

- [Deployment](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/deployment) — Node, Lambda, Cloudflare Workers, Bun, Deno
- [Security Checklist](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/security) — OWASP-recommended middleware
- [Background Threads](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/background-threads) — worker_threads, serverless limits
- [ML Inference](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/ml-inference) — serverless-aware model caching
- [Testing Strategy](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/testing) — real integration tests
- [TypeScript](https://nodalite.akkil.dev/guides/typescript) — generics, typed routes, validation

## Packages

- nodalite / @nodalite/core — core framework, zero dependencies
- @nodalite/middleware — security and HTTP middleware
- @nodalite/auth — authentication and authorization
- @nodalite/adapter-node — Node.js server adapter
- @nodalite/adapter-lambda — AWS Lambda adapter
- @nodalite/adapter-edge — Cloudflare Workers adapter
- @nodalite/ws — WebSocket server
- @nodalite/workers — background threads
- @nodalite/scheduler — cron and interval scheduling
- @nodalite/otel — OpenTelemetry integration
- @nodalite/ml — ML inference runner
- @nodalite/openapi — OpenAPI spec generation

## Install

npm install nodalite

## Repository

https://github.com/AkkilMG/Nodalite
